title: A.J. Cronin's Hatter's Castle
writer: A.J. Cronin, Paul Merzbach, Rudolph Bernauer
actors: Robert Newton, James Mason, Deborah Kerr
plot: James Brodie (Robert Newton) is the only hatter in a small area in Scotland. Ruthless in business as well as at home, he is a tyrant to his family and intimidating to everyone he knows. But, when his mistress convinces him to give...
